name: tradingview-strategy
description: OpenClaw shared skill -- TradingView strategy generation (Pine Script v6), backtest diagnosis, strategy selection from a canonical library, and webhook alert config. Pure logic, no exchange API calls. Signals are executed by the hyperliquid skill only.
author: hugo

tools.name: tv_generate_strategy
tools.description: Generate a complete modular Pine Script v6 strategy (7-module pipeline). Always enforces //@version=6, process_orders_on_close=true, commissions >=0.1%, a max-drawdown kill switch, all params exposed via input.*, and the webhook JSON block. Returns the script plus recommended params and target metrics.

description.description: Natural-language description of the desired strategy

market.description: Target market/ticker, e.g. BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT, EURUSD, SPY

style.description: Trading style; maps to the Pine signal module

tools.name: tv_analyze_backtest
tools.description: Diagnose backtest metrics against deploy thresholds (WR>=55%, PF>=1.5, MaxDD<25%, trades>=50, Sharpe>=1.0) and the optimizer diagnostic table. Returns a verdict (deploy/optimize/reject), per-metric pass/fail, over-fitting red flags, issues and concrete recommendations.

total_trades.description: Number of trades in the backtest

tools.name: tv_select_strategy
tools.description: Recommend a strategy from the canonical library (STRATEGIES.json) based on market, timeframe and market regime. Returns the best match with starting params and target metrics, plus alternatives. Use before generating a strategy when the user has not specified one.

market.description: Market/ticker, e.g. BTC, ETH, EURUSD, SPY

regime.description: Current market regime (optional, defaults to any)

tools.name: tv_create_webhook_config
tools.description: Build the TradingView alert message (JSON with TV placeholders) ready to paste into a strategy alert, and resolve which OpenClaw skill the exchange routes to. Only HYPERLIQUID executes for real; other exchanges are documented stubs. Never echoes the WEBHOOK_SECRET value.

strategy_id.description: Strategy identifier (matches strategy_id in the alert payload)

exchange.description: TradingView exchange name, e.g. HYPERLIQUID, BINANCE, BYBIT, NASDAQ. Default HYPERLIQUID.

tools.name: tv_healthcheck
tools.description: Self-check: strategy library integrity, webhook env vars (WEBHOOK_SECRET, TV_WEBHOOK_PORT, TV_SIGNALS_DIR), and the exchange routing table. Safe to call anytime.
